{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Fiends of Chaos
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|True [[Fiends]] defy classification by nature.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c21">''Blackflame'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Fiends of Chaos]] are powerful entities trapped within [[Asylum]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c15">''Reaper'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
